task_completion.description: Verify the 'Tristan_da_Cunha' ground station is created with the correct coordinates and altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'New ground station' or 'Edit ground station' dialog showing the name 'Tristan_da_Cunha', Latitude around 37.1052 S (or -37.1052), Longitude around 12.2777 W (or -12.2777), and Altitude 20m.

task_completion.description: Verify a tracking module named 'SAA_Targets' exists and has 'Tristan_da_Cunha' assigned as its ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module window titled 'SAA_Targets' or the module configuration dialog showing 'Tristan_da_Cunha' selected in the ground station dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify the four required satellites (METOP-B, METOP-C, SUOMI NPP, NOAA 19) are added to the 'SAA_Targets' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'SAA_Targets' module configuration or main view listing the satellites METOP-B, METOP-C, SUOMI NPP, and NOAA 19.

task_completion.description: Verify the global preferences are set to predict 50 passes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences window (likely under the 'Predict' or 'Passes' tab) showing the 'Number of passes to predict' field set to 50.

task_completion.description: Verify the map grid and terminator line are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences window (under Modules -> Map) with checkboxes for 'Show grid' and 'Show terminator' checked, OR observe the main map view displaying a visible coordinate grid and a shaded day/night terminator line.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show GPredict dialog boxes (Preferences, Edit Module, New Ground Station) being interacted with, rather than terminal commands executing scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the changes are made within the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window should have the standard GPredict interface, menus, and map displays, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing configuration files in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) open with GPredict configuration files (e.g., .config/Gpredict/...) in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Tristan_da_Cunha ground station coordinates: 37.1052 S (-37.1052), 12.2777 W (-12.2777), Altitude: 20m. Required satellites in SAA_Targets module: METOP-B (NORAD 38771), METOP-C (NORAD 43689), SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849), and NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591). Global preferences must have: Number of passes to predict = 50, Map grid = enabled, Map terminator line = enabled.
